name: dogpay
description: Build DogPay payment, webhook, wallet, card, and virtual-account integrations with Codex.

interface.longDescription: DogPay helps Codex implement token authentication, hosted crypto checkout, payment webhooks, wallet withdrawals, card issuing, and virtual-account flows using the official DogPay API docs.
defaultPrompt: Add DogPay hosted checkout to this app.
Create a DogPay API client with token caching.
